The grey dial is accented with rose gold-tone hands, offering a refined contrast for easy readability. Powered by a quartz movement, it ensures precision and reliability in timekeeping. A stainless steel link bracelet with a deployment clasp completes the design, providing a secure and comfortable fit. With a 5 ATM water resistance, this watch can handle light splashes and showers.

processedData.description: The Roberto Cavalli Lady - RC5L122M0085 is an elegant wristwatch designed specifically for fashion-conscious adults. It features a silver-gray stainless steel case with a thickness of 7 mm and a diameter of 24 mm. The bottle green dial adds an interesting accent and perfectly complements the silver and gold bracelet. The watch is equipped with a precise quartz movement and is water-resistant up to 50 meters.
